title: DragN’s Deadly Dinos!
description: An apocalyptic dinosaur mod that adds dinos, equipment, blocks, and more!
body:
### DragN’s Deadly Dinos

Welcome to 2071, where over 80% of the human population has been destroyed by disease or prehistoric predators. DragN’s Deadly Dinos is a(n) post/ apocalyptic event, taking place 26 years after an ecological disaster known as Project 3000.

<>
DragN’s Deadly Dinos (DDD) is an apocalyptic dinosaur mod for Minecraft 1.18.2! With tons of new dinosaur species to discover, you'll have plenty of challenges to face. Fend off hungry carnivores and scavenge for resources to stay alive.

Thankfully, you'll have some new tools and blocks at your disposal. Craft armor and weapons with the bones of the prehistoric beasts you've defeated, and craft reinforced blocks to keep your base protected.



**Project REBUILD:**

I'm in the process of rebuilding Deadly Dinos' artwork to make it more consistent with Minecraft. This includes item art, and dinosaur models, textures, and animations. I'm also in the process of fixing bugs and QoL stuffs. Stay tuned for new 'Rebuild' updates! 

If you find any bugs or other issues, please let us know! (Our Discord is linked at the bottom of this page!)


**Dinos**
